revision.comment: [[WP:CAT#T]]
revision.text:
<includeonly> {{Sidebar with collapsible lists | name = Kongo religion sidebar | bodyclass = hlist | basestyle = background:#e1bae7 ; | pretitlestyle = padding-top:0.4em; | pretitle = Part of [[:Category:Nubia|a series]] on | titlestyle = line-height:1.2em; | title = [[Kongo religion|{{nowrap|Kongo}} religion]] | listtitlestyle = border:1.5px solid #e1bae7;text-align:center; | image = [[File:Kongo Cosmogram - blank.png|120px]]
| list1name = religions | list1title = [[Religion|Religions]] | list1 = * [[Antonianism]] * [[Kongo religion|Kongo]] * [[Catholic Church in Kongo|Kongo Catholicism]]
| list2name = deities | list2title = [[List of African deities and mythological figures#Kongo|Deities]] | list2 = * [[Bunzi]] * Chicamassi-chinuinji * Dinganga * [[Jesus in Christianity|Jesus]] * Kimbazi * Kuitikuiti * Lubangala * Lusiemo * Lusunzi * Makanga * Ma Kiela * [[Mami Wata|Mamba Muntu]] * Mbantilanda * Mbenza * Mboze * Mbumba * Moni-Mambu * Ngonde * Ntangu * [[Nzambi a Mpungu|Nzambi Mpungu]] * [[Nzambici]] * Nzazi * Phulu Bunzi * [[Yahweh]] <!--------------------------------------------------------->
| list3name = elements | list3title = [[:Category:Kongo culture|Elements]] | list3 = * [[Veneration of the dead| Ancestral veneration]] * [[Kalunga line]] * [[Kongo cosmogram]] * [[Mfinda]] * [[Kongo religion#Nature spirits and fetishes|Nature spirits]] * [[Nganga]] * [[Traditional African medicine|Nlongo]] * [[Simbi]] <!--------------------------------------------------------->
| list4name = art | list4title = [[Religious art|Art]] | list4 = * [[Nkisi]] * [[Nkondi]] * [[Tumba (Kongo)|Tumba]] <!--------------------------------------------------------->
| list5name = diaspora | list5title = Diaspora | list5 = {{Navbox|none | listclass = hlist | basestyle = background-color:#edd7f1;
| group1 = [[Hoodoo (spirituality)|Hoodoo]] | list1 = * [[Black cat bone]] * [[Candomblé Bantu]] ([[Afro-Brazilians|Brazil]]) * [[Goofer dust]] * [[Hoodoo (spirituality)|Hoodoo]] ([[African Americans|USA]]) * [[Hot foot powder]] * [[Kumbaya]] * [[Mojo (African-American culture)|Mojo bag]] * [[Ring shout]]
| group2 = Religions | list2 = * [[Candomblé]] ([[Candomblé Bantu|Bantu]]) * [[Comfa]] * [[Espiritismo]] * [[Palo (religion)|Palo]] * [[Myal]] ([[Convince]], [[Kumina]]) * [[Maria Lionza]]
}} <!--------------------------------------------------------->
| below = {{Icon|CAT}} '''[[:Category:Kongo|Category]]'''
}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation | content = {{Kongo religion sidebar}} {{notice |A horizontal version of this template is at {{tl|Kongo religion footer}}.}} }} [[Category:Mythology sidebar templates]] [[Category:Paganism templates]] </noinclude>

| list1name = religions | list1title = [[Religion|Religions]] | list1 = * [[:en:Antonianism|Antonianism]] * [[:en:Kongo religion|Kongo]] * [[:en:Catholic Church in Kongo|Kongo Catholicism]]
| list2name = deities | list2title = [[List of African deities and mythological figures#Kongo|Deities]] | list2 = * [[:en:Bunzi|Bunzi]] * Chicamassi-chinuinji * Dinganga * [[:en:Jesus in Christianity|Jesus]] * Kimbazi * Kuitikuiti * Lubangala * Lusiemo * Lusunzi * Makanga * Ma Kiela * [[:en:Mami Wata|Mamba Muntu]] * Mbantilanda * Mbenza * Mboze * Mbumba * Moni-Mambu * Ngonde * Ntangu * [[:en:Nzambi a Mpungu|Nzambi Mpungu]] * [[:en:Nzambici|Nzambici]] * Nzazi * Phulu Bunzi * [[:en:Yahweh|Yahweh]] <!--------------------------------------------------------->
| list3name = elements | list3title = [[:Category:Kongo culture|Elements]] | list3 = * [[Veneration of the dead| Ancestral veneration]] * [[:en:Kalunga line|Kalunga line]] * [[:en:Kongo cosmogram|Kongo cosmogram]] * [[:en:Mfinda|Mfinda]] * [[Kongo religion#Nature spirits and fetishes|Nature spirits]] * [[:en:Nganga|Nganga]] * [[Traditional African medicine|Nlongo]] * [[Simbi]] <!--------------------------------------------------------->
| list4name = art | list4title = [[Religious art|Art]] | list4 = * [[:en:Nkisi|Nkisi]] * [[:en:Nkondi|Nkondi]] * [[Tumba (Kongo)|Tumba]] <!--------------------------------------------------------->
| list5name = diaspora | list5title = Diaspora | list5 = {{Navbox|none | listclass = hlist | basestyle = background-color:#edd7f1;
| group1 = [[:en:Hoodoo (spirituality)|Hoodoo]] | list1 = * [[:en:Black cat bone|Black cat bone]] * [[:en:Candomblé Bantu|Candomblé Bantu]] ([[:en:Afro-Brazilians|Brazil]]) * [[:en:Goofer dust|Goofer dust]] * [[:en:Hoodoo (spirituality)|Hoodoo]] ([[:en:African Americans|USA]]) * [[:en:Hot foot powder|Hot foot powder]] * [[:en:Kumbaya|Kumbaya]] * [[:en:Mojo (African-American culture)|Mojo bag]] * [[Ring shout]]
| group2 = Religions | list2 = * [[:en:Candomblé|Candomblé]] ([[:en:Candomblé Bantu|Bantu]]) * [[:en:Comfa|Comfa]] * [[:en:Espiritismo|Espiritismo]] * [[:en:Palo (religion)|Palo]] * [[:en:Myal|Myal]] ([[:en:Convince|Convince]], [[:en:Kumina|Kumina]]) * [[:en:Maria Lionza|Maria Lionza]]
}} <!--------------------------------------------------------->
| below = {{Icon|CAT}} '''[[:Category:Kongo|Category]]'''
}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation | content = {{Kongo religion sidebar}} {{notice |A horizontal version of this template is at {{tl|Kongo religion footer}}.}} }} [[Category:Mythology sidebar templates]]
</noinclude>
